A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent ultimately filtered all articles by an arbitrary description-length window (execute_python function-call-13977983421001229604) rather than computing the maximum length among sports articles from the full dataset (query_db function-call-8531003678679978584), leading it to pick "U.S. Bounces Back to Beat Greece 77-71" instead of the true longest sports article title.
